response.global_summary: A performance video of the song 'dahlah.' featuring VTubers Vestia Zeta, Kaela Kovalskia, and Kobo Kanaeru (Hololive Indonesia), followed by an introductory and closing talk segment.

scenes.description: The VTubers perform the song 'dahlah.' with dancing on a stage.
scenes.performer_in_video: Vestia Zeta, Kaela Kovalskia, Kobo Kanaeru

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Isn't it usual?
Stabbed by disappointment
When the world doesn't go as it should (oh oh)
Maybe it's time
You just try to let go
No need to ask why anymore

If indeed...
You don't get the answer
Don't cry
Try to go through the puzzle
Let it go
Because in the end
You are stronger than you think

Just dahlah (Just forget it)
Oh just dahlah
Just live it
Just dahlah
Oh just dahlah
Just live it

Even though sometimes numb
Even until helpless
And your effort feels useless

If indeed...
You don't get the answer
Don't cry
Try to go through the puzzle
Let it go
Because in the end
You are stronger than you think

Release all control
Step on the gas and run
Accept and end it

If indeed...
You don't get the answer
Don't cry
Try to go through the puzzle
Let it go
Because in the end
You are stronger than you think

Just dahlah

Just live it

Oh just dahlah
